steps.title: Find the shared painting feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the two paintings. The notes describe both paintings as huge and give their large dimensions.

steps.title: Reject contrast statements
steps.content: Choice A contrasts artists and dates. Choice B explicitly emphasizes different people and actions. Choice D contrasts the subjects depicted. The sentence that says both paintings are huge and provides their dimensions directly highlights the similarity. The answer is C.
